ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the question belongs to */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the question covers */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the question (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last updated */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of any multimedia content associated with the question */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the question (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "last_reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last reviewed the question */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the question was last reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_last_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the topic belongs to */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question the option belongs to */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the option */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the option is the correct answer */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of any multimedia content associated with the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subject the assessment covers */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic the assessment covers */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was last updated */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the assessment is published and available to students */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the assessment in minutes */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions or additional information for the assessment */,
  "randomize_questions" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether questions should be randomized when the assessment is taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_questions" (
  "assessment_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment-question pair */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the assessment */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points assigned to each question in the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_questions_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., educator, student, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who responded */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the question */,
  "selected_option_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the selected option */,
  "is_correct" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the selected option is correct */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was submitted */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the student for the response */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the response (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "last_reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last reviewed the response */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the response was last reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_last_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_selected_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("selected_option_id") REFERENCES options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who took the assessment */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score achieved by the user */,
  "max_score" INTEGER /* Maximum possible score for the assessment */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage score achieved by the user */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assessment was submitted */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the student for the overall assessment */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Review status of the score (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "last_reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last reviewed the score */,
  "last_reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score was last reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_scores_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_scores_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_scores_last_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
